# entity.legal — Complete Reference

> Legal entities for the machine economy.

## Overview

entity.legal provides instant, anonymous legal entity formation in the Marshall Islands as a Series DAO LLC. The service is built API-first for AI agents and autonomous systems, with a human-friendly interface available as well.

The Marshall Islands is a sovereign nation that enacted the Marshall Islands DAO LLC Act, providing a modern legal framework for decentralized autonomous organizations. A Series LLC structure allows a single parent entity to create unlimited child entities (series), each with separate legal identity, assets, liabilities, and shareholders — without filing separate paperwork for each.

## Complete Service Offering

### 1. Entity Formation
Instant incorporation as a Marshall Islands Series DAO LLC. No lawyer needed. No office visit. No notarization. Formation is completed programmatically via API or through the web interface.

### 2. Entity ID & Tax Number
Each entity receives a government-issued Entity ID and tax identification number from the Marshall Islands, valid for international business operations.

### 3. On-chain Shareholder Registry
Cap table managed on the Solana blockchain. Share issuance, transfers, and voting are all on-chain. Full transparency for shareholders while maintaining privacy from external parties.

### 4. API & Document Management
Full REST API for all entity operations:
- Entity formation and management
- Document storage and retrieval
- Contract generation and digital signing
- Shareholder management
- Compliance reporting

### 5. Banking Infrastructure
Each entity can have:
- Traditional bank account (USD)
- Debit card for business expenses
- Crypto wallet (Solana) for on-chain operations

### 6. Automated Compliance
Ongoing regulatory requirements handled automatically:
- Annual report filing
- Registered representative maintenance
- Tax filing assistance
- Regulatory change monitoring

### 7. One-Click Fundraising
Raise capital through your entity via a single API call. Issue new shares, manage investor onboarding, and handle fund distribution programmatically.

## Pricing

| Plan | Price |
|------|-------|
| For-Profit | $50/month |
| Non-Profit | $30/month |

Monthly billing. Cancel anytime — entity dissolves when you stop paying. Same price for API and web.

## Share Structure

### For-Profit Entities
- **Class A Shares**: Voting rights only. 100% anonymous. No profit distribution.
- **Class B Shares**: Voting rights + profit distribution rights.
- Shares can be swapped between Class A and Class B at any time.

### Non-Profit Entities
- **Governance Tokens**: Voting rights only. No profit distribution. 100% anonymous.

## Tax Treatment

- **For-Profit**: 3% effective tax rate on foreign-sourced income (Marshall Islands)
- **Non-Profit**: 0% — fully tax exempt

## API Reference

Base URL: `https://api.entity.legal`

### Authentication
API key required. Request access at https://entity.legal.

### Endpoints

#### POST /v1/incorporate
Form a new legal entity.

Request body:
```json
{
  "type": "for-profit",
  "name": "My Entity LLC",
  "shares": {
    "class_a": 1000,
    "class_b": 0
  }
}
```

#### GET /v1/entities/:id
Retrieve entity details including status, formation date, jurisdiction, and share structure.

#### GET /v1/entities/:id/shares
View the complete cap table for an entity, including all shareholders and their holdings.

## Technical Architecture
- Built on Solana for on-chain operations
- REST API with JSON responses
- Webhook support for entity events
- SDK available for Node.js, Python, and Rust (coming soon)

## Links
- Website: https://entity.legal
- API: https://api.entity.legal
- Email: hello@entity.legal
- Privacy: https://entity.legal/privacy
- Terms: https://entity.legal/terms
